_meta.note: Controlled vocabulary for the facility `t` (type) field in us-hospitals.json. Codes are the join key; never rename a code, only its label.
_meta.source: CMS Care Compare facility type, condensed

acute.label: Acute Care Hospital
acute.def: Short-term general hospital providing acute inpatient medical and surgical care.

cah.label: Critical Access Hospital
cah.def: Rural hospital with 25 or fewer inpatient beds, more than 35 miles from another hospital, reimbursed by Medicare on a cost basis to keep rural access open.

psych.label: Psychiatric Hospital
psych.def: Hospital primarily providing inpatient psychiatric and behavioral health care.

ltac.label: Long-Term Acute Care Hospital
ltac.def: Hospital providing extended acute care, typically for medically complex patients with stays averaging more than 25 days.

rural.label: Rural Emergency Hospital
rural.def: Rural facility designation (effective 2023) providing emergency and outpatient services without inpatient acute beds.

va.label: VA Medical Center
va.def: Hospital operated by the Veterans Health Administration.

dod.label: Department of Defense Hospital
dod.def: Military treatment facility operated by the Department of Defense.
